Scholarship Program

Save money on your study abroad experience with the RnW.edu Scholarship program. The scholarship offers opportunities to study at a reputable college or university in Canada, the United Kingdom, or the United States. The scholarship covers tuition fees for up to three academic years and provides additional monies to cover other expenses such as housing and living expenses.

Ancillary Services

Save money on your study abroad experience with the RnW.edu Scholarship program.

SOP/ Resume Writing

We wrote SOP, LOR, and essays to build the best case for your admission.

Visa Assistance

We work with you closely and provide step-by-step guidance to get your visa approved.

Air Tickets

Let us know where you want to fly, and let us bring air tickets to you – at unbeatable prices.

SIM Card

Stay connected with your folks with hassle-free purchase of inexpensive SIM cards.

Accommodations

Book a hostel, dorm, or apartment near your college/university immediately.

Forex Services

Get the best rates for your foreign currency requirements and free door delivery.

Travel Insurance

Comprehensive insurance plans for medical expenses, accidental damage, lost baggage and more

Pre- departure

Know what you can, must and should not do abroad – before you leave the country.

Why Red & White International

The advantages that set us apart will set you apart.

Exam Preparation

Experience the most advanced and proven exam preparation services in the industry.

All-inclusive

Full range of services in one place to help you cover all aspects of study abroad planning.

Personal Guidance

Help with every step, from making the initial decision to application, travel and enrollment.

Track Record

Please take advantage of our success in the Indian market, with over 150,000 students receiving assistance.

Featured

Take Your Free Counselling

  • Select Your Preferred Time And Date To Talk To Our Admission Counsellors.
  • Our Counsellors Will Evaluate Your Profile And Suggest Your Roadmap For Applying To Canadian/UK/USA/Universities.

Success Stories

Our students, who are proud of their achievements, eventually become our brand ambassadors. We’re indebted to them.

The perfect place for IELTS learning in Red & White. Your end result for high band score lies in this place. A very homely and purely noncommercial place to learn. Going hand in hand with all areas of IELTS task 2 writing which needs a lot of input is well-taken care way better than any other commercial center. Thank you so much sir for your valuable guidance and support.

Harsh Pansuriya

It's a fantastic place for the one preparing for the IELTS exam, and I especially thank my trainer. Who is constantly motivating me? I like how he trained me; his tips and grip over the subject give me confidence that I can get a good score. You've been accommodating and supportive at every step. I'm pleased with my experience with Rnw International.

Mansi Golaniya

Being the IELTS student, I am happy after joining the r&w IELTS because of hearing I get the best faculty that give us proper guidance and also provide best knowledge, give him to practical knowledge. Here we get proper atmosphere for IELTS and PTE. In the end, I am saying that My dream is not my but now it is also of r & w. Thank you RNW, you stated the IELTS and PTE in this area and taking some responsibility to make our dreams come true.

Anand Desai

The best experience with this faculties. From IELTS coaching to visa process, all the things conducted in smooth and transparent. Thanks to all respective faculties.It was pleasant to work with red & White International. Counsellors provided helpfuladvice and up-to-date information. Fast, efficient service was provided. Legitimate companies are becoming more difficult to find.

Vaibhav Kathiriya

My dream of studying in the United Kingdom has come true by sheer efforts of Red & White International. Thank you Raj sir for your sincere efforts. "

hardik Dave

Thorough guidance and unaltered monitoring are two aspects that define "Red & White's " Constant dedication in its "PTE Coaching".Recommended to all "PTE enthusiasts".

Neha jogani

I have just got my UK study visa through Red & White International. The process seemed effortless. Truly a proud moment for me and my family. Kudos to you Red & White team.

Jenish Parkhiya

My all time goal to acquiring an education has come true as I have received my UK visa recently with Red & White Institute being the single most contributor for thus success. Thanks & Regards.

Dax Dobariya

My journey through ielts has been a memorable one. The efforts that R & W team put, are commendable. Thank you for being my guiding light to achieve my desired band score.

Rutva Joshi

Cracking the ielts examination with a good band score was no more a delimma once i joined Red & White International. They have made it possible for me through their flawless guidance. Regards.

Payal Waghela

Honest opinion plus factful guidance in Ielts - This is what defines R & W internationals dedication for students betterment. My ielts score is all dedicated to you. Thank you R&W.

Dhruv Dhola
